title: GERD Relief with 10 Best Herbal Creams to Try
description: Zingiber zerumbet cream, also known as white ginger, is a natural remedy that may help with Gastroesophageal Reflux Disease (GERD). This condition occurs when stomach acid flows back up into the esophagus, causing discomfort and pain. The active compounds in Zingiber zerumbet cream, such as gingerols and shogaols, have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. These properties can help reduce inflammation in the esophagus and stomach, which can help alleviate symptoms of GERD. Addi...
